title: Vendor statement SQL uses nonexistent column
expected_behavior: Statement sums active payment applications and returns CSV.
actual_behavior: SQL filters bpa.reversed_at, a column absent from schema and migrations.
evidence: Static SQL-to-schema comparison; endpoint was not invoked against customer data.
safe_reproduction: Call the statement endpoint with a synthetic vendor in a test database and observe undefined-column failure.
business_impact: AP reporting and customer trust are impaired.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Availability/correctness risk; no direct exposure.
recommended_correction: Use canonical is_active/voided_at state and add endpoint integration coverage.

title: Placeholder Privacy Policy and Terms are public
expected_behavior: Approved legal disclosures are published.
actual_behavior: Both pages explicitly instruct the owner to replace placeholder copy before launch.
evidence: Production pages returned 200 and rendered placeholder instructions.
safe_reproduction: Open /privacy and /terms.
user_impact: Users lack complete reliable disclosures and terms.
business_impact: Material legal, contractual, and trust risk.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Privacy obligations are not fully documented.
likely_root_cause: Design copy shipped as legal copy.
recommended_correction: Publish counsel-approved versioned policies with effective date/contact details.

title: Frontend production dependency advisories
expected_behavior: High advisories are reviewed and mitigated.
actual_behavior: npm audit reports 8 vulnerabilities: 5 high and 3 moderate.
evidence: npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=low exited 1 on 2026-07-10.
safe_reproduction: Run the recorded audit command without applying fixes.
user_impact: Potential package-specific availability or security failures.
business_impact: Security exposure and forced upgrade risk.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Advisories include DoS, cache/request, XML, cookie, and injection classes; reachability varies.
recommended_correction: Upgrade deliberately in a separate tested security PR; do not force-fix blindly.

title: Backend production dependency advisories
expected_behavior: High advisories are reviewed and runtime bundles are known.
actual_behavior: npm audit reports 18 vulnerabilities: 12 high and 6 moderate.
evidence: npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=low exited 1 on 2026-07-10.
safe_reproduction: Run the recorded audit command without applying fixes.
user_impact: Potential integration/API failure depending on reachability.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Advisories include SSRF, prototype pollution, request tampering, and DoS; tooling findings may not ship.
likely_root_cause: Fast-moving transitive graph and CLI packages in dependencies.
recommended_correction: Separate build-only packages, inspect bundles, and upgrade with integration tests.

title: Supplied production API hostname does not resolve
affected_feature: All API workflows and Plaid webhook compatibility
expected_behavior: One canonical documented production API resolves.
actual_behavior: actwy6st05 from the brief failed DNS; cpjh7t19u1 health returned 200 and is embedded in the live app.
evidence: Safe HTTP/DNS checks and live bundle inspection.
safe_reproduction: GET both /v1/health endpoints and inspect the production ledger chunk.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Missed Plaid notifications could create stale data if any consumer still uses the old host.
likely_root_cause: API migration and compatibility documentation drift.
recommended_correction: Confirm every consumer and Plaid webhook, publish one source of truth, and retire legacy references safely.

title: Editable role policies are not dependable enforcement
expected_behavior: Saved None/View/Full values consistently control backend access.
actual_behavior: New businesses default OFF/wave 0; API says notEnforcedYet; UI is store-only and wording conflicts.
evidence: Static flow from policy save through mode evaluation.
safe_reproduction: Create a synthetic business and inspect defaults/policy behavior.
business_impact: Least-privilege and delegated administration are unreliable.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Static role allowlists remain, but custom restrictions cannot be trusted.
likely_root_cause: Staged rollout stopped before enforcement migration.
recommended_correction: Remove editing or complete explicit enforcement with migration and audit logs.

title: Mutation handlers request VIEW policy strength
affected_feature: Categories, preferences, entries, uploads, vendors, AP
expected_behavior: Mutations require FULL.
actual_behavior: Six mutation families pass requiredLevel VIEW.
evidence: Static call-site and policyAllows review.
safe_reproduction: Enable enforcement for a synthetic business, assign VIEW, and call each mutation.
user_impact: Displayed view-only settings can still permit writes.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Unauthorized-by-policy financial/configuration mutation within static role allowlists.
recommended_correction: Use FULL for all mutations and enforce an invariant test.
tests_required: VIEW denial and FULL success for all six families

title: Repeated AP apply/unapply can violate uniqueness
expected_behavior: Repeated apply/unapply cycles preserve history.
actual_behavior: Unique entry_id,bill_id,is_active permits only one inactive historical row.
evidence: Constraint-state analysis.
safe_reproduction: Apply, unapply, reapply, and unapply the same pair in a test DB.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Active allocation may remain when a reversal fails.
likely_root_cause: Boolean composite uniqueness instead of partial active-row uniqueness.
recommended_correction: Use a partial unique index WHERE is_active=true with migration planning.

title: CSV exports permit spreadsheet formula injection
affected_feature: Ledger, reconciliation, snapshot, and vendor CSV exports
expected_behavior: Spreadsheet formula prefixes are neutralized.
actual_behavior: Only CSV syntax is escaped.
evidence: All exporters allow user-controlled cells beginning with formula characters.
safe_reproduction: Use a synthetic =1+1 payee/memo and open export in a protected spreadsheet environment.
user_impact: Opening an export can evaluate attacker-controlled formulas.
business_impact: Export trust and endpoint safety are reduced.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Potential external requests, misleading output, or spreadsheet-side actions.
likely_root_cause: CSV quoting confused with formula neutralization.
recommended_correction: Centralize formula-safe CSV encoding across all exporters.
tests_required: malicious prefix fixtures for every exporter

title: Baseline web security headers are absent
expected_behavior: Deliberate HSTS, CSP, frame, referrer, type, and permissions headers.
actual_behavior: Production root has none and exposes X-Powered-By: Next.js.
evidence: Production HEAD response header enumeration.
safe_reproduction: HEAD https://app.bynkbook.com/ and inspect headers.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Framing, downgrade, referrer, MIME, and injection defense gaps.
recommended_correction: Add staged headers and report-only CSP before enforcement.

title: Tracked production env file contains stale placeholders
expected_behavior: Clean production builds use validated canonical values.
actual_behavior: Tracked file uses unused api.bynkbook.com and placeholder Cognito values; live Amplify overrides it.
evidence: Tracked file inspection and live bundle comparison.
safe_reproduction: Build in a clean environment without deployment variables and inspect bundled configuration.
user_impact: Alternate/recovery builds can have broken auth and API.
business_impact: Releases are not reproducible from repository defaults.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Environment confusion can route to wrong dependencies.
likely_root_cause: Placeholder file retained after API/auth migration.
recommended_correction: Use examples plus strict build-time validation for placeholders and approved hosts.

title: Operational controls are not defined in infrastructure code
expected_behavior: Alarms, access logs, abuse controls, and recovery settings are codified or referenced.
actual_behavior: Routes/log permissions exist; alarms, API access logs, WAF/rate controls, and database backup resources are absent.
evidence: Static IaC search; deployed out-of-band state not inspected.
safe_reproduction: Review SST constructs and then compare with deployed resources after AWS verification.
user_impact: Failures may last longer or be harder to diagnose.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Potential unobserved failures or abuse.
likely_root_cause: Legacy/shared resources live outside current SST stack.
recommended_correction: Inventory deployed controls and codify/reference them with runbooks.

title: Required AWS profile is unavailable
expected_behavior: ledrigo-dev profile returns account 116846786465.
actual_behavior: AWS CLI reports the profile cannot be found.
evidence: Exact required command output.
safe_reproduction: Run the command recorded in 09-test-and-command-results.md.
business_impact: AWS configuration cannot be independently assured.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: IAM, public access, logs, backups, and current data remain unknown.
recommended_correction: Provide least-privilege read-only profile with required name/account.
tests_required: exact STS account check before any AWS inspection

title: Production bridge depends on dev-named live resources
expected_behavior: Production resources are isolated and reproducible.
actual_behavior: Repository operations docs identify dev-named RDS, S3, Cognito, and KMS as live production dependencies.
evidence: Repository record dated 2026-07-09; not independently AWS-verified.
safe_reproduction: After STS verification, compare resource IDs read-only.
user_impact: Accidental cleanup can cause outage or data loss.
business_impact: High operational blast radius and environment confusion.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Mis-targeted deletion/rotation/cutover risk.
recommended_correction: Freeze identifiers and perform rehearsed one-dependency-at-a-time migration with rollback.

title: Landing page exposes a named-business demo scene
expected_behavior: Sample data is generic and clearly fictional.
actual_behavior: Production names Flo Vapor and More Dallas with hardcoded May 2026 metrics.
evidence: Production browser snapshot.
safe_reproduction: Open production root.
user_impact: Visitors may think real customer data is shown.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: No evidence the values came from production data.
recommended_correction: Use labeled fictional sample data.

title: Public text actions have undersized touch targets
expected_behavior: Touch targets are approximately 44px high.
actual_behavior: Several visible text buttons measured 16px high at 390x844.
evidence: Production browser bounding-box evaluation.
safe_reproduction: Set a 390x844 viewport and measure visible buttons.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: None.
likely_root_cause: Inline buttons lack minimum hit area.
recommended_correction: Add transparent padding/min-size without changing visual text size.

title: Unused handler re-export shims remain
expected_behavior: Only mapped handler entrypoints remain.
actual_behavior: SST maps base .ts files and extra .handler.ts files are not referenced.
evidence: 49 SST handler strings compared with repository filenames/imports.
safe_reproduction: Build an import/handler map and verify no references.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: None.
recommended_correction: Delete only after synth/import proof in cleanup PR.

title: Dev dialog gallery ships as a production route
expected_behavior: Internal galleries are dev-only.
actual_behavior: Next production build emits /dev/dialogs; auth but no developer gate applies.
evidence: npm run build route manifest.
safe_reproduction: Build and inspect route list; signed-in access only with test account.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: No mutation found.
likely_root_cause: Playground placed under production route tree.
recommended_correction: Environment-gate or move to isolated tooling.

title: Core page clients are monolithic
expected_behavior: Independent concerns are isolated and testable.
actual_behavior: Queries, mutations, dialogs, exports, and UI are combined in very large modules.
evidence: Source measurement; local static chunks total about 4.0 MB uncompressed.
safe_reproduction: Measure source and build chunk files.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Regression risk in financial workflows.
recommended_correction: Extract incrementally after safety tests exist.

title: No frontend automated test suite
expected_behavior: Auth, navigation, forms, financial display, mobile, and errors have repeatable tests.
actual_behavior: Playwright is installed but no tests/config/test script exist.
evidence: Repository file and script inventory.
safe_reproduction: Search for test/spec files and Playwright config.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Permission and financial UI regressions may be missed.
recommended_correction: Add component tests and safe stage/mocked Playwright workflows.

title: Authenticated production workflows were not executed
expected_behavior: Approved synthetic production tenant supports safe verification.
actual_behavior: No safe account/tenant was provided; no customer credentials or records were used.
evidence: Signed-out browser session and safety log.
safe_reproduction: Provide an approved test tenant and execute the founder guide.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: Tenant isolation and role behavior are code-traced but not live-tested.
recommended_correction: Create approved synthetic tenant with explicit mutation limits.

title: SST build and synth were not run
expected_behavior: Production infrastructure packages/synthesizes in the verified account context.
actual_behavior: Command was skipped after required AWS profile failure; typecheck and Prisma validate passed.
evidence: Command log and safety hard stop.
safe_reproduction: After STS verification and required env, run non-deploying SST validation.
security_or_data_integrity_impact: No change was made.
recommended_correction: Rerun non-deploying synth after account/environment verification.
